title: Haxthausen
summary:
Haxthausen is a surname. Notable people by that name include:

Holger Haxthausen (1892-1959), Danish professor of dermatology.
August von Haxthausen (1792-1866), nobleman.
Frederik Gottschalk von Haxthausen (1750–1825), Danish-Norwegian politician.
Aurore von Haxthausen (1830-88), Swedish artist.
